editionData.title: Daily Brief for April 21, 2026: Global Headlines, Markets, Hacker News, Product Hunt
editionData.description: A daily brief for April 21, 2026 covering global headlines, market closes, Hacker News, and Product Hunt.
editionData.author: Sony Mathew

headlines.title: Iran War Live Updates: Tehran and Trump Send Mixed Signals Ahead of Potential Talks
headlines.summary: Vice President JD Vance is set to lead a U.S. delegation to Pakistan as Mr. Trump pushes for a peace deal. Iranian officials said privately they would send a team if Mr. Vance were there.

headlines.title: A Leaner Saudi Arabia Turns From Grandiose Plans to Pragmatism
headlines.summary: A decade after Mohammed bin Salman unveiled his “Vision 2030” program to transform the country’s economy, the kingdom is facing financial strains and reassessing its trajectory.

headlines.title: Javier Milei Tamed Argentina’s Inflation. Now He Wants to Reshape Its Values.
headlines.summary: Argentina’s right-wing president has tamed the country’s runaway inflation. Now he wants to transform its values.

headlines.title: Ukraine, Short on Troops, Is Turning to Robots to Help Its War Efforts
headlines.summary: Ukraine is using unmanned ground vehicles armed with bombs, guns or rockets to carry out attacks and keep its soldiers out of harm’s way.

headlines.title: Starmer Voices Fury Over Being Kept in the Dark on Mandelson Vetting
headlines.summary: During intense grilling in Parliament, Prime Minister Keir Starmer blamed civil servants for not telling him that Peter Mandelson had been rejected for top security clearances.

headlines.title: Trump’s Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer latest to leave administration
Cuba confirms talks with US officials, wants end to Trump’s energy blockade
Six women win 2026 Goldman prize, world’s top environmental award
Iran says no talks ‘under shadow of threats’; Trump says blockade to remain
‘Predators’: Amnesty slams Netanyahu, Putin, Trump, as human rights decline
The Onion has agreed to a new deal to take over Infowars
headlines.summary: The Onion says it has a new deal to take over conspiracy theorist Alex Jones's Infowars media company. If approved, the satirical news website could turn Infowars into a parody of itself.

headlines.title: Tim Cook to step down as Apple CEO. In letter, describes 15 years of emails
headlines.summary: The 65-year-old Cook will turn over CEO duties to Apple's head of hardware products, John Ternus, in September. Cook will remain with the company as executive chairman.

headlines.title: Trump's labor secretary resigns amid investigation into misconduct
headlines.summary: Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer, who was under internal investigation, is leaving her position. She becomes the third cabinet departure of President Trump's second term.

headlines.title: The 11 most challenged books of 2025, according to the American Library Association
headlines.summary: The ALA says 4,235 titles were challenged at U.S. libraries — the second-highest year on record. Forty percent of the challenged works involved LGBTQ+ subjects or the experiences of people of color.

headlines.title: Peace talks are in doubt as the U.S. seizes an Iranian ship
headlines.summary: President Trump said a U.S. delegation will head to Pakistan to resume talks to end the war with Iran, but Tehran expressed reluctance after the U.S. seized one of its cargo ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: US mayor's Shanghai visit renews cooperation
headlines.summary: The mayor of San Francisco, Daniel Lurie, pledged to deepen the 46-year sister-city relationship with Shanghai during his two-day visit beginning on Sunday, his first international trip since taking office in January.

headlines.title: Australian organ donor remembered
headlines.summary: Eight years after losing their son, Australian Philip Hancock's family still remembers the moment they chose to donate his organs in China, a decision that would go on to save the lives of others.

headlines.title: Visit highlights Sino-Vietnamese ties
headlines.summary: The visit of Vietnam's top leader to China confirms that Beijing remains a priority of Hanoi's foreign policy, with the leadership showing strong interest in China's governance and innovation model, experts say.

headlines.title: Brazil, Mexico and Spain pledge to boost Cuba aid
headlines.summary: In a joint move, Brazil, Mexico, and Spain have pledged to scale up aid to Cuba to ease a humanitarian crisis they say stems from a United States blockade of the island.

headlines.title: Truce on edge after Iranian ship seizure
headlines.summary: There is cautious optimism that delegations from both the US and Iran would travel to Islamabad for a second round of talks this week, even though the seizure of an Iranian ship by the US near the Strait of Hormuz and Iran's retaliation have cast doubts over the feasibility of another deal.

headlines.title: More than 700 activists write to EC alleging MCC violation in PM address to the nation
headlines.summary: Over 700 activists urge the Election Commission to investigate PM Modi's alleged MCC violation during his recent national address.

headlines.title: Congress seeks probe into fresh killings in Manipur, flags collapse of law and order
headlines.summary: Congress demands a probe into recent Manipur killings, citing government failure to ensure peace and protect citizens.

headlines.title: Doval’s Riyadh visit on PM’s instructions, part of government outreach to Gulf: MEA
headlines.summary: NSA Ajit Doval meets Saudi leaders to discuss bilateral relations and regional issues amid ongoing U.S.-Iran talks.

headlines.title: 9.8 lakh deletions in Odisha’s voter rolls after electoral mapping process
headlines.summary: Odisha's electoral rolls see 9.8 lakh deletions amid complaints of wrongful removals and ongoing verification processes.

headlines.title: A day before inauguration by PM Modi, fire breaks out at Rajasthan refinery
headlines.summary: Fire erupts at Rajasthan HPCL refinery before PM Modi's inauguration, prompting postponed press interactions and ongoing investigations.

headlines.title: Chavez-DeRemer steps down as US labor secretary amid misconduct probe
Russian interior minister arrives in North Korea for talks
Gunman kills Canadian woman, wounds four at Mexico’s Teotihuacan pyramids
